---
title: "MPOX OUTBREAK ANALYSIS"
author: "Zephania Mwangi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
pacman::p_load(
  rio,        
  skimr,
  janitor,    
  epikit,
  gtsummary,  
  apyramid, 
  tidyverse
)
```
```{r}
# Load linelist data
linelist <- read_csv("Data/linelist.csv")

# Load aggregated dataset (if available)
aggregated <- read_csv("data/aggregated.csv")
```
```{r}
# Clean column names
linelist <- linelist %>% clean_names()

# View structure
glimpse(linelist)

# Convert date variables
linelist <- linelist %>%
  mutate(
    date_onset = ymd(date_onset),
    date_confirmation = ymd(date_confirmation),
    date_notification = ymd(date_notification)
  )

# Check missing values
colSums(is.na(linelist))
```

Person Analysis
```{r}
# Gender distribution
linelist %>%
  tabyl(sex)

# Age summary
summary(linelist$age)

# Age groups
linelist <- linelist %>%
  mutate(age_group = case_when(
    age < 18 ~ "<18",
    age >= 18 & age < 30 ~ "18-29",
    age >= 30 & age < 50 ~ "30-49",
    age >= 50 ~ "50+"
  ))

linelist %>%
  tabyl(age_group)
```
Place Analysis
```{r}
# Cases by country
cases_country <- linelist %>%
  count(country, sort = TRUE)

cases_country
```
```{r}
ggplot(cases_country, aes(x = reorder(country, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Mpox Cases by Country", x = "Country", y = "Cases")
```

Time Analysis (Epidemic Curve)
```{r}
# Cases over time
epi_curve <- linelist %>%
  count(date_onset)

# Plot epidemic curve
ggplot(epi_curve, aes(x = date_onset, y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Epidemic Curve (Mpox)", x = "Date of Onset", y = "Cases")
```
Risk Factor Analysis
```{r}
# Cross-tabulation
tab1 <- table(linelist$sex, linelist$outcome)
tab1

# Proportions
prop.table(tab1, margin = 1)
```
HIV Status Analysis
```{r}
linelist %>%
  tabyl(hiv_status)

# HIV vs outcome
tab2 <- table(linelist$hiv_status, linelist$outcome)
prop.table(tab2, margin = 1)
```

Symptoms Analysis
```{r}
# symptom variable 
linelist %>%
  tabyl(symptoms)
```

SURVEILLANCE & DELAY ANALYSIS
```{r}
linelist <- linelist %>%
  mutate(
    delay_onset_to_confirm = as.numeric(date_confirmation - date_onset),
    delay_confirm_to_notify = as.numeric(date_notification - date_confirmation)
  )

summary(linelist$delay_onset_to_confirm)
summary(linelist$delay_confirm_to_notify)
```

```{r}
ggplot(linelist, aes(x = delay_onset_to_confirm)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Delay: Onset to Confirmation", x = "Days", y = "Frequency")
```

```{r}
# Percentage missing
missing <- linelist %>%
  summarise_all(~mean(is.na(.)) * 100)

missing
```
